form.formComment: Five-year-old mare (Art Major - Bettor Be Supreme) making her debut. Finished third at Bunbury in a trial on April 4 over 2100m. Placed in a recent trial and a bold showing is expected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Five-year-old mare (Art Major - Bettor Be Supreme) making her debut. Finished third at Bunbury in a trial on April 4 over 2100m. Placed in a recent trial and a bold showing is expected.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run he was well back in the run when 5th (Fr4) over 2190m at Bridgetown, at the bell was 7th-5.9+m beaten 11 m by By Royal Command (2:46.20) in 3yo MAIDEN on March 23 2025 at $5.50. Can open the campaign with a forward performance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Gave ground from the 500m to be beaten approximately 95m.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Sr1) over 1730m at this track beaten 35 m by Captain Cooper (2:05.80) in 4yo+ MAIDEN on April 7 at $26. At her previous start good run when 3rd (Fr3) over 1684m after showing early speed at Pinjarra beaten 35 m by From Tigerland (2:01.00) in MAIDEN on March 30 at $5.50. Has the ability to figure prominently from a better draw.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr4) over 2190m after showing early speed at Northam, beaten 80 m by American Eyes (2:44.50) in 4yo+ MAIDEN on April 11 at $16. Two runs back 5th (Sr2) over 1730m at this track beaten 35 m by Captain Cooper (2:05.80) in 4yo+ MAIDEN on April 7 at $126. This looks far too tough.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr2) over 1730m after showing early pace at this track, beaten 35 m by Captain Cooper (2:05.80) in 4yo+ MAIDEN on April 7 at $61. Two runs back 6th (Fr2) over 1684m at Pinjarra, beaten 55 m by From Tigerland (2:01.00) in MAIDEN on March 30 at $16. Must do a lot more.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Received a flat tyre in the back straight on the final occasion.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 9th (Fr4) over 1730m after showing early speed at this track beaten 40 m by Captain Cooper (2:05.80) in 4yo+ MAIDEN on April 7 at $9. At the run before good run when 2nd (Fr5) over 1684m at Pinjarra, beaten 35 m by From Tigerland (2:01.00) in MAIDEN on March 30 at $6.50. Winning chance on her best form.

form.formComment: Resuming after a layoff of eight months. Well beaten at the end of her last preparation at this course and distance when fourth at very long odds behind Rockstar Quality. Recent trials will help bring her on but a lack of race-fitness might work against.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resuming after a layoff of eight months. Well beaten at the end of her last preparation at this course and distance when fourth at very long odds behind Rockstar Quality. Recent trials will help bring her on but a lack of race-fitness might work against.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 7 m finishing third after showing early speed, behind Nowuseemegrin at Wagin over 1776m in a 4yo+ 0-2 WINs on April 2 at $7. Then a handy effort when well beaten into second after being driven well back, behind American Eyes at Northam over 2190m in a 4yo+ MAIDEN on April 11 at $14. Among the major players on his latest effort.

form.formComment: Having his second run back from a spell. Game effort when 2nd (Sr3) over 1730m at this track, beaten 17 m by Captain Cooper (2:05.80) in 4yo+ MAIDEN on April 7 at $6.50. Winning prospects.
